command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
-- Check current column type
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, CHARACTER_MAXIMUM_LENGTH 
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'training_sets' AND COLUMN_NAME = 'puzzlesJson';

-- Fix: alter to LONGTEXT to handle large puzzle sets
ALTER TABLE training_sets MODIFY COLUMN puzzlesJson LONGTEXT NOT NULL;
